lazuli.title: Lazuli
lazuli.description: Built a full-stack e-commerce application with a Django REST Framework backend and React/Vite frontend, featuring product catalogue, cart, orders, authentication, and an admin dashboard.

fittech.title: FitTech
fittech.description: Built a multi-tenant SaaS gym management platform with member CRM, equipment tracking, AI coaching, real-time chat, wallet and billing, and analytics.

pfe.title: PFE Academic Platform
pfe.description: Built scalable Django REST APIs for project management, role-based access, and real-time notifications.

library.title: Tisemsilt Library Website
library.description: Delivered high-performance Django APIs for catalog search, reservations, member management, and caching.

ibuy.title: IBuy Retail Platform
ibuy.description: Created a retail e-commerce solution with barcode checkout, inventory analytics, and mobile/web synchronization.

autopart.title: AutoPartMarket
autopart.description: Developed auto parts marketplace features for compatibility search, order tracking, and admin inventory control.

ai.title: AI Code Review Assistant
ai.description: Built a GPT-4 powered RAG code review system with vector search and prompt engineering.
